case_title: BRIAN WAN ET AL VS. ASHLEY NICOLE ARCHER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WAN, BRIAN WAN, FONNY AS TO DEFENDANT ARCHER, ASHLEY NICOLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 30.00 SERVED APR-26-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARCHER, ASHLEY NICOLE
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WAN, FONNY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2018 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO SEP-07-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF BRIAN WAN. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF FONNY WAN. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ASHLEY NICOLE ARCHER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES TO SEPT. 7, 2018 AT 8:30AM.
REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - ASHLEY NICOLE ARCHER; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NO RECEPTACLE - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
STIPULATION BEFORE PRO TEM FILED BY WAN, BRIAN WAN, FONNY ARCHER, ASHLEY NICOLE
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WAN, FONNY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MELIFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CAES DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-18-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT TO MAKE FOUR PAYMENTS OF $471.25 ON THE FIRST OF EVERY MONTH STARTING OCTOBER 1, 2018. LAST PAYMENT TO BE ON JANUARY 1, 2019. IF THIS REVISED PAYMENT PLAN FAILS, COURT WILL ISSUE JUDGMENT ON THE REMAINDER DUE. PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
